content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks for LLMs can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to break the inherent bias of single-perspective iterative self-feedback. This creates a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no additional training or supervised data, while solving the common problem of single-perspective self-refinement getting stuck in local suboptimal outputs.
